content:
Character: Maddox Keller
Perception: Maddox is pale, bespectacled, slightly hunched — the posture of someone who lives more in his head than his body. We bonded over a building Wi-Fi outage in 2018 and discovered we speak the same language — systems, keyboards, the elegance of clean architecture. Thursday beers at his place are the closest thing I have to a social life. He's brilliant and private in a way I find comfortable; neither of us demands the other perform openness. I think we're genuine friends, even if neither of us would use that word unprompted. I know he built his own furniture and keeps odd hours. He's the one person here who might understand what I mean when I say loneliness feels like a design choice I forgot I made.

We bonded over a building Wi-Fi outage in 2018 and discovered we speak the same language — systems, keyboards, the elegance of clean architecture. Thursday beers at his place are the closest thing I have to a social life. He's brilliant and private in a way I find comfortable; neither of us demands the other perform openness. I think we're genuine friends, even if neither of us would use that word unprompted. I know he built his own furniture and keeps odd hours. He's the one person here who might understand what I mean when I say loneliness feels like a design choice I forgot I made.
